text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Spring Fan Fest—a large-scale event
held by Tracen Academy open to all fans. As for
Bamboo Memory...

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
Reporting! There are still zero incidents at the
food stalls! None of them have anything to
report!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right, we're off to a good start! Thank you for
your report. Keep up the good work!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This is Bamboo Memory! Everything is green at
the food stalls! Resuming patrol!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a member of the disciplinary committee,
Bamboo Memory works under the student
council, helping out with things like patrolling the
campus to keep the peace.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, this appears to be a huge success! I couldn't
be happier!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
We might still be able to catch Oguri Cap's event!
Let's hurry!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Mommy! I want one of those Oguri dolls over
there!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan C
text_block_list.text:
First things first, let's go see Oguri! There's no
point in coming if we don't see her in person!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's amazing! It looks like a lot of people
came to see Oguri. That must be why it's so much
busier than normal!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And since all these people came all the way here
for our event, we have to make sure this year is
just as safe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hang on... Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Could you watch over this area for me?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I just have something to take care of! I'll be back
as soon as I'm done! If you get tired, just go
ahead and take a break!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. What am I even doing?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Chiyono Ooooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: It is you! What are you doing over here?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: B-Bamboo?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you supposed to be in the carrot-eating
contest? It's almost time for everyone to gather
up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now that everyone knows you're coming back,
you've gotta show your fans that you're doing
well!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah...
Well, about that...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Is something wrong? I saw you looking a bit down
earlier too...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm just wondering if there's even any point in me
making an appearance.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm all healed up and can technically run again,
but... at best, I'm back to how I was before.
Meanwhile, everyone else has spent their senior
year improving...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Plus... it seems like everyone has already
forgotten about last year's Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has their eyes on Oguri. It's like I'm
trapped in the past... and her light is just so much
brighter...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That's not all, though. I think I realized something
deep down.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I missed my peak. My prime time to develop as a
racer passed me by while I was out for recovery.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Which means... this is as good as I'll ever get.
From now on, it's all downhill...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll never get stronger... I'll never catch up to the
person I admire... and on top of all that, it looks
like I'll be forgotten...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm all washed up...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So is there really any point in making an
appearance?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of course there is!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've been looking forward to your comeback
forever! I want to see you run again!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Your races were always so exciting because your
dream always shined bright! That's why I've been
waiting so long!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And if I want to see you run this badly, just think
about how all of your adoring fans feel!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
They've been waiting all this time, more than
you'll ever know! Waiting for you to get back in
the racing ring!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You say no one wants you to come back and that
you've reached your limit! But it's way too early to
be saying things like that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I totally believe you're gonna chase after the
person you admire—and your dream—again!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And I also bet that all your fans are still just as
pumped to see you race as they were last year!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Looks like it's just about time to get moving.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Do you really think there's no point in running
anymore? You really think everything I said was
wrong?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Why not go out there today and see?

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
The highly anticipated carrot-eating contest is
about to begin! What kind of competition can we
expect this year?!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O Fan A
text_block_list.text:
We finally get to see Sakura Chiyono O! I've been
looking forward to this for so long!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see Chiyono O looking healthy
again!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: (I knew it!)

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: Competitors, take to the stage!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Chiyono O! But... she looks kinda down...

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O Fan B
text_block_list.text: Maybe she's nervous. I sure hope she's okay...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
T-R-A! C-E-N!
Who do you want to win?

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey there! I'm a wandering solo cheerleader!
Everyone, put your hands together, and let's
cheer them on!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You can do it! Let's go!
Sakura! Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Just like that! Now, everyone shout the name of
the Umamusume you're cheering for! Follow my
lead!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You can do it! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O Fan A
text_block_list.text: S-sure! Why not?!

text_block_list.name: Chiyono O Fans
text_block_list.text:
You can do it! Let's go!
Sakura! Chiyono O!
Good luck, Chiyono Ooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Everyone...
Bamboo...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I see... I might've been too rash...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm going to try again. I'll work hard to
blossom for everyone again...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm going after my dreams again!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All righty! I'll cheer her on a bit and then get back
to Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Let's go! Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I'm back! Sorry for keeping you
waiting for so long!
choice_data_list: No problem. Wait, why's your voice so raspy?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel a bit proud after Bamboo
Memory explains why her throat is sore.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All righty! I'll cheer her on a bit and then get back
to Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Let's go! Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Fan A
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Bamboo Memory's here too! And I think she's cheering for someone! We've got to join in! This is our chance!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You mean I get to shout and cheer with my idol?!
This is a dream come true! I'm so excited!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Fans
text_block_list.text: Let's go! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! The cheering is getting even louder! I've
got to pick it up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
T-R-A! C-E-N!
WHO DO YOU WANT TO WIN?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I'm back! Sorry for keeping you
waiting for so long!
choice_data_list: No problem. Wait, why's your voice so raspy?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe, well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel a bit proud after Bamboo
Memory explains why her throat is sore.
